\tzpentry{ID5877}{Maps Solutions Solutions Code Form Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5877 introduces Maps Solutions Solutions Code Form Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$ maps solutions to solutions. In code form: \begin{verbatim} InverseFrameDragging[Φ_ac(t,r,θ,φ), ω] := Module[{T,R,Φ_rev}, T = AntiUnitary[t -> -t]; R = RotationMatrix[-ω*(t - t0)]; Φ_rev = T[R[Φ_ac(t,r,θ,φ)]]; Assert[ForwardPropagate[Φ_rev,ω,Δt] == Φ_ac(0,r,θ,φ)]; Φ_rev ]; \end{verbatim} This ensures the reversed field $
\]
